send_to_cs: ➜ If there are still issues send to CS
drive_to_purchase: Unless cx specifies, default to recommending "The Bartesian Cocktail Maker"
journey_replies_process: The automated journey will ask the customer if they were satisfied with the product:
➜ If the customer answers "No" an automated message will ask them what went wrong - when they respond use temp "Journey 1" and ESC
➜ If the customer answers "Yes" an automated message will ask them what they liked - when they respond use temp "Journey 2" only
For the journey where customers are asked what is their preferred spirit:
➜ If they answer incorrectly/multiple answers - send the template for the spirit they select
➜If they answer with multiple options - edit/combine the templates

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Comfrt: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Comfrt.
Comfrt: Welcome to Comfrt! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Comfrt: Welcome to the Comfrt family! Your discount code is WELCOME15. Click here to auto-apply it and shop now: comfrt.attn.tv/agYSOemNfcha . Text STOP to stop
Comfrt: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!
Comfrt: You are already subscribed. Click here to shop now: comfrt.com.
ORDER UPDATE
ORDER

Comfrt: I'm here to help. If you're talking about your order 5078386, it shows that a label has already been created. You can track the status of the package here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aSK3lrbkQ45B 

"Label Created" usually means the shipping label has been made and the package is waiting to be scanned by the carrier. Sometimes the tracking doesn't update right away, even if we've already dropped it off. Please give it a few more days, and if there's still no update, feel free to check back in. I'm happy to help!
ORDER UPDATE

Comfrt: You may have missed the message I sent earlier. If you're talking about your order 5078386, it shows that a label has already been created. You can track the status of the package here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aaiQk6AZ9wVO

"Label Created" usually means the shipping label has been made and the package is waiting to be scanned by the carrier. Sometimes the tracking doesn't update right away, even if we've already dropped it off. Please give it a few more days, and if there's still no update, feel free to check back in. I'm happy to help!

Is there any way to pay for express shipping? I need the order by Tuesday

Fashion Nova: Thanks so much for reaching out! I totally get needing your order by Tuesday 💨

You can check out our available shipping options and timeframes here:
http://sms.fashionnova.com/agjTykNuUQYr

If you've already placed your order, the best next step would be to reach out to our Customer Care team directly for assistance:
http://sms.fashionnova.com/aXPVl9hZyks-

They'll be able to take a closer look and see if there's anything that can be done. Let me know if you need help with anything else!
Is there any way to cancel the order
Fashion Nova: Sorry! Once an order is placed we cannot cancel or modify an order. If you are unhappy with the purchase you may return it.
Can I receive a refund ?

Fashion Nova: Good question! Fashion Nova issues refunds to the original form of payment used on an order in the event that your order:
is canceled by Fashion Nova, one or more of your items sold out since your order was processed, or item(s) proved to be received damaged, defective, or incorrect. You can learn more here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/aIs9t2rX72-7
Can you change the shipping address?
Fashion Nova: I'm afraid not but you can reach out to our team here http://sms.fashionnova.com/aPM2oSBWjMIe- to see if we can do something about it. You'll be in excellent hands!
